title: Enchantment Cap Extension
description: Extends the level cap for several vanilla enchantments.
body:
Extends the level cap for the following enchantments:

Bane of Arthropods [V -> X]
Blast Protection [IV -> X]
Efficiency [V -> X]
Feather Falling [IV -> V]
Fire Protection [IV -> X]
Fortune [III -> VIII]
Impaling [V -> X]
Knockback [II -> V]
Looting [III -> VIII]
Luck of the Sea [III -> VIII]
Lure [III -> V]
Power [V -> X]
Projectile Protection [IV -> X]
Protection [IV -> X]
Punch [II -> V]
Respiration [III -> V]
Sharpness [V -> X]
Smite [V -> X]
Sweeping Edge [III -> V]
Unbreaking [III -> V]
